description: Pinned checked-in prerelease seed generated from data/source/currency-data.seed.json; normalized UTF-8/LF SHA-256 7d26419d3ac6743023f346dd3d0f91a446f974f51e92b47b161d662d13c5c573; not a full ISO/CLDR snapshot.

sources.notes: Curated prerelease seed used by the generated registry until the full ISO/CLDR data snapshot epic replaces it. The hash is calculated over normalized UTF-8 text with LF line endings.

upstreamReferences.name: SIX ISO 4217 currency and funds code list

redistributionNotice: This package data is a derived, curated metadata snapshot and is not an official ISO 4217 redistribution.
